items.headline: Bailey's false positive is now a documented teaching case
items.detail: Jasmine Lund: closed on-call (3.7 SIEL), paid deposit, then Call Objection in HubSpot 7 days later. I=1, E=1. No emotional anchoring = close didn't hold. This is the first time the scoring system predicted a reversal & it materialised exactly. One case study is worth 100 role plays for the team. Use it Monday.

items.headline: Tom starts tomorrow with the highest call 1 score ever
items.detail: 7.5 on his first DC - above Anthony's 5-call average (5.96) & Rye's 3-call average (5.17). Dentist metaphor = gold standard for son buy-in. One fix: fear bomb cycling (I=3). Rye coaching him from day 1 means Rye's new role has an immediate proof point. Tom + Rye is the play.

items.headline: 194 booked calls this month at $27.23 CPBC
items.detail: Well under the $35 warning line. Meta spend $5,283 MTD. But ad-to-member conversion matters more than CPBC - last audit showed H14-B1 at 5.1x ROAS while H1-B1 was 0.6x. Same CPBC range, wildly different revenue. Monthly ROAS refresh due this week to see how Batch 2 hooks are converting.

items.headline: Agent Stack Roadmap - 14 skills, Leo's building
items.detail: You handed this off Friday. Build order set: Content Engine first (extends newsletter writer to 5 formats), then Daily AI Scout, then Win/Loss Analyser (70% built from SIEL work). Revenue Reconciliation moved up to catch silent leaks. Progress updates coming to you unprompted - this is my project now.

items.headline: Alpha School's 'Time Back' is the retention framing B&G is missing
items.detail: Alpha's #1 lever: motivation through giving kids their time back. B&G Circle MVP (April W2) can test this - frame it as 'your son gets 2 hours of focused development instead of scrolling'. Not 'come to our program'. Time Back reframes value from what they pay to what they get back. Podcast analysis shipped Friday.

leo_actions: Building Content Engine skill (Agent Stack item #1) - extends newsletter writer to 5 output formats
Monthly ROAS refresh prep - pulling March ad attribution data for Batch 2 analysis
Tom's Monday onboarding checklist finalised - contract signed, Schedule B still needs Rye + Harry
MC data refreshed & pushed to GitHub
